final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original brand poster for RAN QIU, embodying the poetic stillness of autumn in the warm reverence of contemporary Eastern minimalism.

Style/medium: brand poster with the quiet contemplation of wabi-sabi aesthetics, designed as a meditative pause between breaths
Composition: generous breathing room with the brand mark as centered weight, natural elements whispering at the edges
Subject: RAN QIU brand mark (RAN QIU 标志) as the still point, surrounded by the soft conversation of autumn leaves and warm earth
Scene/backdrop: golden hour landscape dissolving into soft blur, the world holding its breath in late autumn light
Lighting/mood: warm honey light of the golden hour, a sacred stillness where time slows and warmth lingers
Color palette: #8B3A1E (深秋棕红) in quiet dialogue with #E8DCCB (米色) and #D4A574 (金棕色), the chromatic temperature of a held breath in late autumn
Materials/textures: matte paper grain, the silken fold of dried leaves, brushed earth tones with shallow depth dissolving into cream
Text (verbatim): RAN QIU 标志
Constraints: abundant negative space, shallow depth of field, warm color harmony, brand colors preserved exactly
Avoid: information clutter, harsh contrasts, cold tones, generic stock autumn aesthetic, decorative elements fighting the silence
